headline: NVR Is Set to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: NVR's second-quarter 2026 performance is likely to have reflected soft housing demand, affordability pressures, elevated mortgage rates and margin headwinds.

headline: United Rentals is Set to Report Q2 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
summary: URI heads into Q2 earnings with strong rental demand and fleet productivity in focus as investors assess whether margin gains can offset cost pressures.

headline: Unveiling United Rentals (URI) Q2 Outlook: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for United Rentals (URI), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended June 2026.
